case_title: PAUL SHEPHERD VS. JUAN CARLOS RODRIGUEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00) SERVED OCT-01-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JUAN CARLOS
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
STIPULATION JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENVELD (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY SHEPHERD, PAUL RODRIGUEZ, JUAN CARLOS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-26-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PAUL SHEPARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUAN CARLOS RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT. APPEARANCE AT THE DEC-26-2019 HEARING IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENVELD; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $100.00 FILED BY SHEPHERD, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JUAN CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
